CustomField.description: Optional Apex class name for custom post-processing logic that runs after the standard data import processing completes. The class must implement the BDI_IPostProcess interface. Use this to add custom business logic such as creating additional related records or sending notifications.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the fully qualified Apex class name that implements BDI_IPostProcess for custom post-processing. Leave blank if no custom post-processing is needed.
CustomField.label: Post Process Implementing Class
